tests.name: TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API detectStack returns "ts" for .ts files (FAILS if extension matcher misses TypeScript)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API detectStack returns "ts" for .tsx files (FAILS if tsx not recognized)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API detectStack returns "python" for .py files (FAILS if Python branch removed)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API detectStack returns "csharp" for .cs files (FAILS if .cs branch removed — primary C# regression guard)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API detectStack returns null for unknown extensions (FAILS if stack fallback returns wrong value)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API detectStack is case-insensitive on extensions (FAILS if toLowerCase removed)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API detectStack returns null for empty filename (FAILS if guard removed)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API nestedLoopCount counts `for (...)` for TS stack (FAILS if regex broken)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API nestedLoopCount counts ONLY `for X in Y:` for Python (FAILS if Python regex matches C-style for)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API nestedLoopCount Python regex does NOT match `for (` C-style (FAILS if Python regex too loose)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API nestedLoopCount counts both `for (` AND `foreach (` for C# (FAILS if csharp branch missing foreach)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API nestedLoopCount csharp counts foreach-only (FAILS if foreach token missing)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API nestedLoopCount returns 0 for empty body (FAILS if regex matches empty)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API nestedLoopCount does not count `for` substring inside identifier (FAILS if regex unanchored)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API suggestInvariants always includes cardinality + uniqueness (FAILS if base set changed)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API suggestInvariants adds conservation for nxm-overlap (FAILS if mapping changed)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API suggestInvariants adds conservation+monotonicity for composition-chain (FAILS if mapping changed)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API suggestInvariants adds coverage+no-leak for Dictionary/Map return types (FAILS if dict branch removed)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API suggestInvariants adds idempotence+monotonicity for Iterator/Iterable types (FAILS if iter branch removed)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API suggestInvariants falls back to cardinality+uniqueness+conservation for generic list types (FAILS if default branch wrong)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan returns empty candidates/suppressed for empty content (FAILS if scan crashes on empty)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan detects TS function returning Array<T> (FAILS if TS collection regex broken)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan flags TS nested-for as nxm-overlap (FAILS if loop counting/threshold broken)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan detects C# method returning List<T> with nested for+foreach (FAILS if csharp dispatch broken)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan parses Python suppression with reason ≥8 chars (FAILS if suppression parse broken)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan flags reason <8 chars as REASON_TOO_SHORT (FAILS if boundary check removed)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan reason boundary: exactly 8 chars → no warning (FAILS if off-by-one)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan reason boundary: exactly 7 chars → REASON_TOO_SHORT (FAILS if off-by-one)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan TS arrow function const detected via m[2] capture (FAILS if m[1] || m[2] fallback broken)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan suppression lookahead bounded to i+4 lines — function 5+ lines below NOT attached (FAILS if Math.min→Math.max)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan orphan suppression comment without function below produces empty suppressed (FAILS if target-null guard removed)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan suppressed.function string format = name:1-indexed-line (FAILS if +1 → -1 off-by-one)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan candidate.line = 1-indexed function declaration line (FAILS if +1 → -1)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan return type window bounded to next 5 lines — distant return type does NOT cross-attach (FAILS if i+5 → larger)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan endLine bounded to 40 lines from function start (FAILS if 40 → larger)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan nested loops outside function body do NOT cross-attach (FAILS if endLine slice unbounded)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan reason string preserved verbatim including punctuation (FAILS if .trim() removes content / regex captures too greedy)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan suppression same-line form on function declaration line attaches correctly (FAILS if same-line path broken)
TESTQUAL001_UNIT: detect-invariant-candidates module API scan suppressed function NOT in candidates (FAILS if suppressedLines exclusion broken)

config.testRunner_comment: vitest is the project test runner (see vitest.config.ts)
config.vitest_comment: After Import Guard refactor — detect-invariant-candidates.ts экспортирует API; новый detect-invariant-candidates-unit.test.ts импортирует напрямую. Vitest --related теперь находит chain.
config.coverageAnalysis_comment: detect-invariant-candidates.ts is invoked via spawnSync subprocess, not module import. Per-test analysis impossible — fall back to off (run all tests per mutant).
